description: Extracts the master file table from the volume.
examples:
Command Example
#
!ps-remote-export-mft host="XSOAR-XSOAR" volume=C
Human Readable Output
#
MFT Export results
#
ComputerName

!ps-remote-export-mft host="XSOAR-XSOAR" volume=C
Human Readable Output
#
MFT Export results
#
ComputerName
MFT File
MFT Size

outputs.description: The extract master file table command result. PsRemote.Host The host on which the command was invoked.
outputs.name: PsRemote.ExportMFT

outputs.description: The Fully Qualified Domain Name of the host on which the command was invoked.
outputs.name: PsRemote.FQDN
